PS-3.manual_guidance: Review personnel screening procedures and background check records. Verify that background investigations are completed before granting access to systems containing CUI. Confirm screening criteria meet organizational and regulatory requirements (NACI, T1, T3 as appropriate). Check for re-investigation schedules.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: individuals are screened prior to authorizing access to organizational systems.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: individuals are screened prior to authorizing access to organizational systems.

PS-4.manual_guidance: Review termination and transfer procedures for personnel with CUI access. Verify that: (a) access is revoked within 24 hours of termination, (b) all credentials and authenticators are disabled/collected, (c) equipment/media containing CUI are recovered, (d) exit interviews address CUI handling obligations, and (e) transfers include access review and adjustment.
evidence_requests: Recent termination/transfer records showing access revocation

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: a policy and/or process for terminating system access authorization and any credentials coincident with personnel actions is established.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide personnel records: a policy and/or process for terminating system access authorization and any credentials coincident with personnel actions is established.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: system access and credentials are terminated consistent with personnel actions such as termination or transfer.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide personnel records: system access and credentials are terminated consistent with personnel actions such as termination or transfer.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: the system is protected during and after personnel transfer actions.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide personnel records: the system is protected during and after personnel transfer actions.
